title: ApiProxyRevision
description: API proxy revision metadata and configuration.

name.description: Output only. Resource name of the API proxy revision.

revision.description: Output only. Revision number of the proxy.

displayName.description: Human-readable name of the API proxy.

description.description: Description of the API proxy revision.

createdAt.description: Output only. Time the revision was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: Output only. Time the revision was last modified.

basepaths.description: Base path(s) for the API proxy.

policies.description: List of policy names included in this revision.

resources.description: List of resource files included in this revision.

proxies.description: List of proxy endpoint names in this revision.

targets.description: List of target endpoint names in this revision.

sharedFlows.description: List of shared flows referenced by this revision.

type.description: The type of the revision (e.g., Application).
